category_sources: source_facts.description says Open Visual Inference and Optimization toolkit for AI inference; official GitHub description says OpenVINO optimizes and deploys AI inference.
display_name_sources: Official docs and GitHub repository style the project as "OpenVINO"; source_facts.name is openvino.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is https://docs.openvino.ai; official GitHub README points users to OpenVINO user documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/openvinotoolkit/openvino, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify AI inference tooling; official GitHub topics/description reference deep learning, computer vision, model optimization, and inference.
